businessSummary.oneLiner: Leading government and enterprise AI platform — AIP pioneering real-world AI deployment at scale
businessSummary.description: Palantir is the dominant AI platform for government and commercial sectors. FY2026 revenue guidance $7.2B (+61% YoY). Friday close $150.89 (-1.7%). AIPCon 9 (3/12) was a major success — GE Aerospace and NVIDIA partnerships expanded, Polymarket + TWG AI unveiled Vergence sports integrity platform. CEO Karp confirmed continued use of Anthropic's Claude despite Pentagon blacklist. Rule of 40 score at 127%. Market cap $369B.
howTheyMakeMoney: Government segment: ~45% of revenue. US DoD/CIA/NATO + Middle East wartime AI deployment
Commercial segment: ~55% of revenue. AIP (AI Platform) enterprise clients + bootcamp model
FedRAMP/IL-5: US government cloud certification — extremely high switching costs
AIP events: AIPCon customer pipeline expansion

keyMetrics.name: P/E Ratio
keyMetrics.interpretation: Very high valuation. Reflects AI premium + growth expectations.

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Still expensive even with FY2027 estimates. Growth sustainability is key.

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Significant profitability improvement. Rule of 40 score 127%.

keyMetrics.name: ROE
keyMetrics.interpretation: Higher ex-SBC. Stock-based compensation distorts GAAP metrics.

keyMetrics.name: Rule of 40
keyMetrics.interpretation: 40%+ is excellent for SaaS. 127% is top-tier.

growthDrivers.title: AIPCon 9 Success — GE Aerospace, NVIDIA Partnerships + Polymarket Vergence
growthDrivers.description: TheStreet (3/12): AIPCon 9 featured expanded GE Aerospace AI partnership, NVIDIA collaboration. Polymarket + TWG AI unveiled Vergence sports integrity platform for new market entry.

growthDrivers.title: Polymarket + TWG AI — Vergence Sports Integrity AI Platform
growthDrivers.description: Bloomberg (3/10): Polymarket adopted Palantir + TWG AI's Vergence engine for prediction market insider trading surveillance. Entry into $300B+ sports betting market.

growthDrivers.title: FY2026 Guidance $7.2B (+61%) — Commercial Segment Accelerating
growthDrivers.description: Tickeron: Commercial revenue share expanded to 55%. Bootcamp model + AIP events driving larger deal sizes. US deal scale trending upward.

growthDrivers.title: Middle East Wartime AI — Karp: 'AI Elevating US Wartime Capabilities'
growthDrivers.description: CNBC (3/13): CEO Karp interview. Palantir technology enhancing US wartime capabilities in Middle East. Long-term defense AI growth driver.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: Unrivaled government AI platform position (FedRAMP/IL-5 certified). AIP bootcamp model driving rapid commercial growth. High switching costs are the core moat.

moats.description: FedRAMP High, IL-5 certified. De facto monopoly on US government/DoD AI platform.
Ontology-based data integration. Once deployed, switching costs are prohibitive.
Bootcamp model for direct customer engagement. Faster time-to-value vs. competitors.
AIPCon events create customer-to-customer case sharing. Network effects compounding.

competitors.name: Snowflake
competitors.detail: Data cloud. Expanding AI analytics capabilities.

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI. Trails Palantir in scale.

competitors.name: Anthropic
competitors.detail: LLM provider. Palantir integrates Claude into AIP.

recentNews.headline: AIPCon 9 held — GE Aerospace, NVIDIA partnerships + Polymarket Vergence unveiled
recentNews.significance: Multi-sector partnerships across healthcare, manufacturing, defense, and sports. Vergence enters sports betting market.

recentNews.headline: Polymarket taps Palantir+TWG AI's Vergence for sports betting integrity
recentNews.significance: AI-powered insider trading surveillance for prediction markets. Entry into $300B+ sports betting market.

recentNews.headline: CEO Karp: 'AI is elevating US wartime capabilities'
recentNews.significance: CNBC exclusive interview. Middle East battlefield AI deployment confirmed. Long-term defense AI growth validated.

recentNews.headline: Palantir continues using Anthropic's Claude despite Pentagon blacklist
recentNews.significance: Karp confirms Claude integration in AIP continues. LLM partnership maintained despite regulatory headwinds.

recentNews.headline: World View partners with Palantir for high-altitude balloon surveillance tech
recentNews.significance: CNBC: World View CEO announces partnership. High-altitude balloon-based intelligence technology.

analystOpinions.notableComment: Barchart: 26 analysts, Moderate Buy consensus, average $200.41 (+33%). MarketBeat $192.68. Valuation concern persists but AI momentum continues.

risks.title: P/E 293x — extreme valuation
risks.description: Extraordinarily expensive relative to current earnings. Major correction possible if growth disappoints.

risks.title: US-Iran tensions escalating — geopolitical risk
risks.description: S&P 500 hit YTD lows. Brent crude above $103. Defense AI benefits but overall market weakness pressures stock.

risks.title: Stock-based compensation (SBC) dilution
risks.description: High SBC costs distort GAAP profitability. Including SBC significantly reduces effective margins.

risks.title: Defense budget volatility risk
risks.description: Government revenue ~45%. Defense budget cuts or administration changes could impact revenue.

risks.title: Anthropic Pentagon blacklist implications
risks.description: Palantir currently uses Claude, but Pentagon blacklisting Anthropic could force LLM provider switch.

buyReasons.title: AIPCon 9 + Vergence — new market expansion
buyReasons.rationale: Sports betting integrity AI entering $300B+ market. GE Aerospace and NVIDIA partnerships expanded.

buyReasons.title: Rule of 40 = 127% — top-tier SaaS performance
buyReasons.rationale: Revenue growth + profit margin sum of 127%. Among the highest scores for any SaaS company.

buyReasons.title: FY2026 $7.2B guidance — accelerating growth
buyReasons.rationale: +61% YoY growth guidance. Commercial segment at 55% of revenue. Deal sizes increasing.

buyReasons.title: Defense AI structural growth — battlefield-validated
buyReasons.rationale: CEO Karp directly confirmed Middle East battlefield AI deployment. Defense AI market growing structurally.

overallOpinion: Palantir holds a unique position in government + commercial AI platforms. AIPCon 9 secured new partnerships (GE, Polymarket, World View).
Vergence (sports integrity AI) entry into the $300B+ sports betting market is a fresh growth catalyst.
Rule of 40 = 127% and FCF $2.1B demonstrate strong fundamentals, but P/E 293x remains a demanding valuation.
US-Iran geopolitical tensions paradoxically drive defense AI demand while pressuring overall market sentiment.
Trading below 50-day MA but above 200-day MA. Medium-term uptrend intact.

investmentVerdict.summary: AI momentum and execution are excellent, but P/E 293x valuation is limiting. AIPCon momentum validated; attractive buy on pullback below $140.

sources.name: CNBC
sources.description: Karp CEO interview — Middle East AI
